---
title: "Tools & Code"
subtitle: "Open source tools and code developed in the Cremer Lab."
---

```{python}
#| echo: false

import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import HTML, display

df = pd.read_csv("data/software.csv", dtype=str).fillna("")

parts = []
for _, row in df.iterrows():
    links = []
    if row["github"]:
        links.append(f'<a href="{row["github"]}">GitHub</a>')
    if row["website"]:
        links.append(f'<a href="{row["website"]}">Project site</a>')
    link_str = " · ".join(links)

    img = row["image"].strip()
    img_tag = f'<img src="images/{img}" alt="{row["title"]}">' \
              if img else '<img src="images/tools_and_code/placeholder.svg" alt="">'

    parts.append(f"""<div class="resource-item">
  <div class="resource-thumb">{img_tag}</div>
  <div class="resource-content">
    <div class="resource-title">{row['title']}</div>
    <div class="resource-meta">{row['language']} · {row['year']}</div>
    <div class="resource-desc">{row['description']}</div>
    <div class="resource-links">{link_str}</div>
  </div>
</div>""")

display(HTML("\n".join(parts)))
```
